fields.Name: SharePoint
fields.Description: Microsoft SharePoint Online integration via Microsoft Graph v1.0. Supports Sites, Drives, DriveItems (files/folders), Lists, ListItems with list columns, ContentTypes, Pages, Permissions, Subscriptions (webhooks), and Analytics. Authenticates via Azure...

fields.Name: Sites
fields.Description: SharePoint sites (team, communication, hub). Discovered via /sites?search=* on tenant root. Primary key `id` is a composite of hostname, site-collection GUID, and web GUID, and should be treated as an opaque string.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Composite site identifier (hostname,site-collection-guid,web-guid). Opaque — do not parse.

fields.Name: lastModifiedDateTime
fields.Description: Most recent modification timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC). Candidate watermark field.

fields.Name: SiteLists
fields.Description: Lists within a SharePoint site. Includes document libraries, custom lists, and calendars. Requires enumeration over sites.

fields.Name: webUrl
fields.Description: URL to list in the browser.

fields.Name: template
fields.Description: List template identifier (documentLibrary, genericList, etc.) — nested in `list.template`.

fields.Name: SiteListColumns
fields.Description: Column definitions on a specific list. Used for custom field discovery — list columns are tenant-defined. IsCustom semantics are applied at runtime.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Internal column name (maps to field key in ListItem.fields).

fields.Name: hidden
fields.Description: Whether the column is hidden from the UI.

fields.Name: isSealed
fields.Description: Built-in system columns are sealed; user-added columns are not.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Column type (text, number, choice, lookup, etc.).

fields.Name: SiteListItems
fields.Description: Rows within a SharePoint list. `fields` is a dynamic dictionary keyed by list column names. Custom field discovery is live-fetched per list via SiteListColumns. Supports delta sync where available.

fields.Name: lastModifiedDateTime
fields.Description: Most recent modification timestamp — used as incremental sync watermark.

fields.Name: webUrl
fields.Description: Full URL to the item in the browser.

fields.Name: contentType
fields.Description: Content type reference (id + name) — governs the item's schema.

fields.Name: fields
fields.Description: Dynamic per-list column values keyed by column name. Expanded via ?expand=fields.

fields.Name: SiteContentTypes
fields.Description: Content type templates defined at the site level — assignable to lists to enforce schema.

fields.Name: hidden
fields.Description: Whether the content type is hidden from the UI.

fields.Name: isBuiltIn
fields.Description: True for system content types; false for tenant-customised ones.

fields.Name: parentId
fields.Description: Parent content type ID (null for root types).

fields.Name: SiteColumns
fields.Description: Column definitions declared at the site level — shared across lists and content types.

fields.Name: hidden
fields.Description: Whether the column is hidden from the UI.

fields.Name: Drives
fields.Description: Document libraries (drives) across tenant. One drive per document library + one per OneDrive user.

fields.Name: webUrl
fields.Description: URL to the drive in the browser.

fields.Name: DriveItems
fields.Description: Files and folders within a drive. Natural key is path: `/drives/{id}/root:/path/to/file`. Supports delta sync via /delta?token=.

fields.Name: size
fields.Description: File size in bytes (0 for folders).

fields.Name: lastModifiedDateTime
fields.Description: Most recent modification timestamp — incremental watermark.

fields.Name: file
fields.Description: Populated for files (mimeType, hashes). Null for folders.

fields.Name: folder
fields.Description: Populated for folders (childCount). Null for files.

fields.Name: parentReference
fields.Description: Reference to parent folder — includes driveId, id, path.

fields.Name: SitePages
fields.Description: Modern pages within a SharePoint site.

fields.Name: SitePermissions
fields.Description: Permission grants at the site level — both inherited and unique.

fields.Name: roles
fields.Description: List of roles granted (read, write, owner).

fields.Name: grantedToV2
fields.Description: Identity the permission was granted to (user / group / application).

fields.Name: hasPassword
fields.Description: True when the sharing link is password-protected.

fields.Name: SiteAnalytics
fields.Description: Aggregate activity statistics for a site — views, unique viewers.

fields.Name: SiteListSubscriptions
fields.Description: Graph change notification (webhook) subscriptions registered against a list. Lifetime is 3 days for SharePoint resources; must be renewed.

fields.Name: clientState
fields.Description: Verification secret echoed by Graph in notifications.

fields.Name: applicationId
fields.Description: Azure AD app ID that created the subscription.

fields.Name: creatorId
fields.Description: User/principal ID that created the subscription.

fields.Name: Shares
fields.Description: Shared item references. Look up by encoded URL: /shares/{encoded-url}. Primary entry point for accessing externally shared content.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Display name of the shared resource.

fields.Name: owner
fields.Description: Identity that owns the shared resource.

fields.Name: driveItem
fields.Description: The drive item target of the share (when shared content is a drive item).

fields.Name: listItem
fields.Description: The list item target of the share (when shared content is a list item).
